payload:
# CravingsPH — Frontend UI Scaffold

## Objective

Scaffold the complete frontend for CravingsPH: all pages, components, route wirings, and state management across three portals (Customer, Owner, Admin) covering all 7 PRD phases. Use shadcn/ui with the established design system.

## Spec Directory

All design artifacts are in `specs/frontend-ui-scaffold/`:
- `design.md` — **primary reference**: routes, component trees, state, interfaces
- `plan.md` — 16-step implementation plan (follow in ... [truncated, 3171 chars total]
step-9a: enhanced owner sidebar committed (3fdc715) — org header, restaurant→branch hierarchy, NavUser footer. Step 9b now unblocked.
step-9b: org gate added to owner layout (1dae12c) — redirects to get-started if no org, exempts onboarding routes. Step 9c now unblocked.
step-9c: owner dashboard page added (9b4c948) — stat cards grid (orders/pending/locations/revenue) + 5 quick action links. Step 9 fully complete. Step 10 (onboarding) now unblocked.
step-10a: onboarding hub page added (0a98fcd) — SetupCard grid with 7 steps, progress bar, completion status derived from tRPC queries. Task 10b (wizard) now unblocked.

step-10b: onboarding wizard page added (9557e41) — WizardProgress, 7 step forms (org/restaurant/branch real forms, menu/payment/verification stubs, completion), URL-based step tracking. Step 10 complete.

step-11a: menu management page added (98aa864) — useManagementMenu hook, MenuItemManagementCard with availability toggle, category filter tabs, loading skeletons, empty state. Next: 11b category dialog, 11c item dialogs, 11d variant/modifier dialogs.

step-11b: AddCategoryDialog + delete category (8ba1212) — AddCategoryDialog with form, useCreateCategory/useDeleteCategory hooks, AlertDialog confirmation with item count warning, category section header dropdown. Next: 11c item dialogs, 11d variant/modifier dialogs.

step-11c: AddItemDialog + EditItemDialog (f00c8e3) — AddItemDialog with category select/name/description/price/imageUrl, EditItemDialog pre-populated from item data, useCreateItem/useUpdateItem hooks. Next: 11d variant/modifier dialogs.

step-11d: VariantsDialog + ModifierGroupDialog (f48bf67) — VariantsDialog with inline add/delete rows, ModifierGroupDialog with collapsible groups + required toggle + nested modifier options. 7 new mutation hooks. Step 11 (menu management) now fully complete. Next: Step 12 (order management).

step-12a: Order management dashboard (48f1acd) — Types (OrderRecord, OrderTab, TAB_STATUS_MAP), 7 stub hooks, OrderRow component with accept/reject, OrderDashboardTabs with 4 tabs + badge counts, orders page with skeleton + empty state. Next: Step 12b (order detail page).

step-12b: Order detail page (9bc8a10) — OrderDetail card (header/customer/items/payment), AcceptRejectActions with AlertDialog rejection flow, StatusUpdateDropdown with forward-only transitions, detail page with breadcrumbs + skeleton + not-found. Next: Step 12c (PaymentProofReview + OrderTimeline).

## Reason
consecutive_failures

## Status
Too many consecutive failures.

## Summary
- Iterations: 16
- Duration: 1h 0m 59s
- Exit code: 1
